Imports

../common

Procs

proc convertExportExprNim(expr: string; sym: NimNode): string {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Converts a Nim expression to the ABI-facing value used by generated internal exports. Source   Edit   
proc convertExportFromNim(sym: NimNode): string {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Converts Nim value to C value (used by DLL side). Source   Edit   
proc convertImportExprNim(expr: string; sym: NimNode): string {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Converts an ABI-facing expression to the Nim value expected by the source library implementation. Source   Edit

    forbids: [].}
Source   Edit   
proc convertToPointer(sym: NimNode): string {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Converts client-side wrapper to pointer for C call. Source   Edit
